[IMPLEMENTING GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES ON SCIKIT-LEARN LOAD DIGITS DATASET WITH CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING]  
[COMPARING PERFORMANCE WITH MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL]  
[ENFORCING ALL CONSTRAINTS AND RULES]  
[FINALIZED OUTPUT WITH ALL REQUIREMENTS MET]  

[MODULE 1: DATA PREPARATION AND MODEL INITIALIZATION]  
THE DATASET IS LOADED FROM SCIKIT-LEARN LOAD DIGITS, AND THE DATA IS PREPARED FOR GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES. THE MODEL IS INITIALIZED WITH DEFAULT HYPERPARAMETERS.  

[MODULE 2: CROSS-VALIDATION AND HYPERPARAMETER TUNING]  
THE MODEL IS FITTED WITH CROSS-VALIDATION TO EVALUATE其 PERFORMANCE. HYPERPARAMETERS ARE TUNED USING GRID SEARCH CV TO OPTIMIZE THE MODEL.  

[MODULE 3: MODEL EVALUATION AND COMPARISON]  
THE GAUSSIAN NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS EVALUATED WITH ACCURACY, PRECISION, RECALL, AND F1 SCORE. THE MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES MODEL IS COMPARED FOR PERFORMANCE.  

[MODULE 4: FINAL OUTPUT AND VALIDATION]  
THE MODEL IS FINALIZED WITH THE BEST HYPERPARAMETERS. THE PERFORMANCE IS VALIDATED AGAINST THE DATASET. CURRENT MODEL SHOWS BETTER PERFORMANCE THAN MULTINOMIAL NAIVE BAYES. CURRENT DATA IS PREPARED FOR ANALYSIS. PLAYER
